name: testDeleteMerchantAcquirer
description: Merchant acquirer can be successfully deleted

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Merchant acquirer can be successfully deleted

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0713.080742 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Click 'Delete business unit acquirer' for merchant acquirer with name: acquirer for gateway
Verify: Success deletion alert message is shown
